synopsis: Join Jedi Master Kelleran Beq (Ahmed Best), wise-cracking protocol droid AD-3 (Mary Holland), and astromech LX-R5 in Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge, as they guide Padawans Sage and Raphael (Blue Team), Quentin and Braden (Orange Team), and Zoe and Malayah (Purple Team) in their quest to become Jedi Knights!
title: Episode 10
